context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct SendGrid package and configuration, builds React Email templates with the correct component library, generates both HTML and plain-text output, and applies the correct tracking settings for transactional emails.

checklist.name: Correct SendGrid package
checklist.description: Uses @sendgrid/mail (not @sendgrid/client or other variants) as the npm dependency for sending emails

checklist.name: API key configuration
checklist.description: Calls sgMail.setApiKey() with the API key sourced from an environment variable (e.g. process.env.SENDGRID_API_KEY)

checklist.name: Click tracking disabled
checklist.description: Sets clickTracking.enable to false (and/or enableText to false) in trackingSettings when sending transactional email via SendGrid

checklist.name: Open tracking enabled
checklist.description: Sets openTracking.enable to true in trackingSettings when sending via SendGrid

checklist.name: React Email component library
checklist.description: Imports template components from @react-email/components (e.g. Body, Container, Heading, Html, Text, Preview, or similar)

checklist.name: React Email render package
checklist.description: Uses the render() function from @react-email/render to convert React components to HTML

checklist.name: HTML version generated
checklist.description: Calls render() without the plainText option to produce the HTML body of the email

checklist.name: Plain-text version generated
checklist.description: Calls render() with {plainText: true} (or equivalent) to produce a text/plain body and passes it to the send function

checklist.name: Inline styles used
checklist.description: Email template uses inline style objects on components rather than external CSS classes or a <style> block for layout and visual styling

checklist.name: Idempotent send guard
checklist.description: Implements a check before sending (e.g. hashing order ID + template name and comparing to a stored record) to prevent duplicate emails from being sent for the same event

checklist.name: Preview component included
checklist.description: Email template includes a <Preview> component from @react-email/components to set the preview text shown in email client inboxes

checklist.name: TypeScript interface for email data
checklist.description: Defines a typed interface (or type) for the email's template data/props rather than using untyped objects
